_draftStatus: [DRAFT — NOT NEUTRAL UNTIL HUMAN-REVISED] AI-drafted starter content. Verify factual plausibility, anti-stereotype calibration, and structural parity with the other three affidavits before treating as production content. The symmetry CI test must not run on this file until reviewed.
name: Ananya Bose

profession.details: Founder and CEO of a Kolkata-based audit-tech / RegTech firm employing roughly 80 people; the company builds compliance-monitoring software used by a handful of state cooperative banks and MSME lenders. Previously a financial-controls consultant with a Big Four firm.

declaredAssets.summary: ₹85 lakh total: ₹35 lakh movable (bank deposits, ESOPs at notional value, modest mutual-fund portfolio, a small two-wheeler), ₹50 lakh immovable (a 1-BHK flat in Tollygunge purchased 2018 with a still-active home loan of ₹22 lakh).

declaredCases.description: Defamation suit filed in 2019 by a software vendor over a public LinkedIn post criticising opaque procurement practices in a state-cooperative bank tender. Suit dismissed by the Calcutta High Court in 2022 on grounds that the post constituted fair comment on a matter of public interest.

affidavit.priorPublicServiceDetails: Volunteer ombudsperson, Kolkata Municipal Corporation citizen-grievance pilot (2021–present). Co-founder, Bengal RTI Network — a volunteer collective filing and tracking RTI requests on state-government procurement (since 2020). Mentor, Ek Bharat Skills Foundation's MSME compliance bootcamp (2022–present).
